description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure with simplified, abstracted features and smooth, flowing contours. The figure appears to be draped in a voluminous garment, with the folds and curves of the fabric rendered in a stylized, faceted manner. The head is rounded and lacks detailed facial features, contributing to the abstract quality of the piece. The arms are positioned close to the body, with one arm resting on the lap and the other possibly supporting the figure. The base of the sculpture is integrated with the lower part of the figure, giving it a solid, monolithic appearance. The overall form is compact and rounded, suggesting a contemplative or serene pose.
description: A stylized, abstract seated human figure with smooth, faceted surfaces and draped clothing. The sculpture has a monolithic, rounded form and minimal facial detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seated figure's torso, draped garment, and rounded head with minimal facial features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the figure's profile, the curve of the back, and the arm resting along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, rounded back and the integration of the figure with the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other arm and the draped garment's folds along the side.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
